name: Hotel O Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel

reviews.originalComment: Pengalaman saya nginap 2 malam di Hotel O near mesjid Oman B. Aceh ini. Luar biasa pelayanan nya. Kamarnya besar, bersih, AC nya dingin, pekerja hotel nya ramah. Kamar mandinya ok, dan yang paling berkesan harga kamar nya terjangkau dikantong kita. Terima kasih Pak atas pelayanan nya.
reviews.reviewComments: My experience staying for 2 nights at Hotel O near the Oman B. Aceh mosque was extraordinary. The service was excellent. The rooms are spacious, clean, the air conditioning is cool, and the hotel staff are friendly. The bathroom is fine, and what stood out the most was the affordable room rates for our budget. Thank you, Sir, for the service.

reviews.reviewPositives: Staff are very helpful and friendly

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya mantap saya menginap dikamar 20,kamarnya bersih,wangi,AC dingin view dari kamarnya pun bagus,tv ada cuma jaringan Wifi-nya belum terkoneksi ke tv,TPI GK Maslah,, petugas nya ramah dan cekatan dalam mengatasi permintaan tamu
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is great, I stayed in room 20, the room is clean, fragrant, the AC is cold, and the view from the room is nice. There is a TV, but the WiFi network is not connected to the TV, but that’s not a problem. The staff is friendly and quick to handle guests' requests.

reviews.reviewPositives: スタッフはフレンドリーで親切、部屋も掃除など綺麗にしてくれていました。周りの商店もフレンドリーでした。屋上からの眺めは良かった。
reviews.reviewNegatives: 洗面台がないのは不便だった。シャワーは水ですが、あと部屋に椅子が欲しい。

reviews.originalComment:
Kamar bagus, ac dingin, nyaman
Cocok buat teman2 yang cari penginapan murah tapi ga murahan
reviews.reviewComments: Nice room, cool air conditioning, comfortable. Suitable for friends looking for affordable accommodation but not cheap.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya nyaman,wangi gk ada bising AC nya dingin,dan kenyamanannya terjamin staf nya cekat dlm meminta bantuan klau kita tidak paham..
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable, smells nice, there's no noise, the air conditioning is cold, and the comfort is guaranteed. The staff is quick to help if we don't understand.

reviews.originalComment:
Gak nyangka sih dengan harga  dbawah 100 ribu dapat hotel nyaman begini
2 malam cuma 150rb
Sedikit was2 sebelum chekin 😄
Ternyata lumanyan banget
Hotel bersih,bukan ditempat bising tpi masih dekat kemana2
Tepat nya dekat mesjid oman
Vasilitas udah dapat ac,kamar mandi pribadi,tv,wifi,peralatan mandi,sajadah
Ada lemari,meja,laci,
Air lancar..
Orang hotel nya juga ramah,
Pokok nya hrga termurah sebanda aceh udah memuaskan banget ini 👍
reviews.reviewComments: I didn't expect that with a price below 100,000, I could get such a comfortable hotel. Just 150,000 for 2 nights. A little cautious before checking in 😄 Turns out it's really good. The hotel is clean, not in a noisy area but still close to everything. Specifically, it's near the Oman mosque. The facilities include AC, a private bathroom, TV, wifi, toiletries, and a prayer mat. There's a closet, table, and drawer. Water supply is smooth. The hotel staff is also friendly. Overall, the cheapest price in Banda Aceh is really satisfying! 👍

reviews.originalComment: Pengalaman saya nginap 2 malam di Hotel O near mesjid Oman B. Aceh ini. Luar biasa pelayanan nya. Kamarnya besar, bersih, AC nya dingin, pekerja hotel nya ramah. Kamar mandinya ok, dan yang paling berkesan harga kamar nya terjangkau dikantong kita. Terima kasih Pak atas pelayanan nya.
reviews.reviewComments: My experience staying for 2 nights at Hotel O near the Oman B. Aceh mosque was extraordinary. The service was excellent. The rooms are spacious, clean, the air conditioning is cool, and the hotel staff are friendly. The bathroom is fine, and what stood out the most was the affordable room rates for our budget. Thank you, Sir, for the service.

reviews.originalComment: Check in tidak ada masalah, langsung dapat kamar, kamar tidur dengan kamar mandi dengan fasilitas closet duduk, air bersih dan lancar, bed bersih, AC dingin, dapat handuk kecil (dikembalikan saat check out) kl ada kekurangan sedikit itu wajar krn harganya sangat terjangkau, 1 malam 2 orang bed double. Pelayanan receptionis ramah. Untuk mengindari penipuan mengatas namakan hotel dan Agoda, hindari chat diluar aplikasi Agoda.
reviews.reviewComments: Check-in was smooth, got the room immediately, a bedroom with a bathroom equipped with a seated toilet, clean and running water, clean bed, cold AC, received small towels (to be returned upon check-out). Any minor shortcomings are reasonable considering the price is very affordable, 1 night for 2 people in a double bed. The receptionist service was friendly. To avoid fraud impersonating the hotel and Agoda, avoid chatting outside the Agoda app.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat terbantu dengan diskon dari Agoda, saran agar menyediakan tempat pesan makanan yang dekat
reviews.reviewComments: Very helped by the discount from Agoda, a suggestion to provide nearby food ordering options.

reviews.originalComment:
Tempatnya bagus, nyaman, tenang, aman, pokoknya bagus dehhh. Kalau ke banda lagi bakal nginep disini lagi!!!
Terimakasih
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice, comfortable, quiet, safe, really good overall. If I go to Banda again, I will definitely stay here again!!! Thank you.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat cocok untuk bagi yg bepergian ke Aceh yg mencari penginapan murah tapi fasilitas lengkap.
reviews.reviewComments: Very suitable for those traveling to Aceh looking for affordable accommodation but with complete facilities.

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan Hotel terletak Di Kota Banda Aceh sangat worth it dengan harga nya yang murah.
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel accommodations located in Banda Aceh are very worth it with their affordable prices.

reviews.originalComment: Daka Hotel sangat nyaman, dengan harga sangat murah kita sudah bisa menikmati istirahat yang nyaman, tanpa ada biaya tambahan, hanya uang jaminan. Tempatnya juga sangat strategis di tengah kota Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Daka Hotel is very comfortable, with very affordable prices we can already enjoy a comfortable rest, without any additional costs, just a security deposit. The location is also very strategic in the center of Banda Aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Nyaman, Aman, Sejuk, Kebersihan standar, handuk di kasih dong, jangan kelupaan atau tunggu di minta dulu hiksss
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable, Safe, Cool, standard cleanliness, please provide a towel, don’t forget or wait to be asked first, sigh.

reviews.originalComment: Walaupun di lantai 3 tapi puas sama smua fasilitas dan nyaman dengan kantong disaat butuh tmpt penginapan yg leluasa
reviews.reviewComments: Even though it's on the third floor, I'm satisfied with all the facilities and comfortable with the budget when needing a spacious place to stay.

reviews.reviewTitle: The hotel is very good, highly recommended.
reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya sangat di rekomenden, stafnya ramah kebersihan juga masih ok sangat cocok dengan harga yg di tawarkan...
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is highly recommended, the staff is friendly, cleanliness is also okay, very suitable for the price offered...

reviews.originalComment: Sangat wort it dgn harganya, standart deluxe dapat <100ribu 👍👍...lokasi pusat kota
reviews.reviewComments: Very worth it for the price, standard deluxe for <100 thousand 👍👍...central city location

reviews.originalComment:
Worth it, sering ada promo
Semua falitas bagus ngk ada minus cuman  sabun mandi, handuk tidak disediakan jadi bawa pribadi, selebihnya aman dan nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: Worth it, there are often promotions. All facilities are good with no downsides, just that soap and towels are not provided so bring your own, other than that it's safe and comfortable.

reviews.reviewTitle: The hotel is great and the service is good.
reviews.originalComment: PERFECT RESEPSIONISNYA RAMAH BANGET PELAYANANNYA MANTAP, HOTELNYA MANTAP LUAR BIASA POKOKNYA NGA AD OBATT, pertahankan FO abang gemoy hitam manis yg tugas malam,,, keren pokoknya
reviews.reviewComments: PERFECT, THE RECEPTIONIST IS VERY FRIENDLY, THE SERVICE IS GREAT, THE HOTEL IS AMAZING, OVERALL NO COMPLAINTS. Keep up the good work, especially to the sweet handsome guy in black who works the night shift... just awesome!

reviews.originalComment:
Hotelnya nyaman,bersih,tidak terlalu bising cuma kekurangan air mineral udh GK dikasih lgi dlu dikasih petkamar 2 botol
Petugas nya ramah2 dan cekantan Ivan Rijal orang nya sangat ramah apa lgi satu orang lgi yg bernama Akbar selalu cepat respon walaupun harus lari2 naik turun tangga😅
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable, clean, not too noisy, but the only drawback is the lack of mineral water; previously, we were given 2 bottles in the room. The staff is very friendly, and Ivan Rijal is very kind, as well as another person named Akbar who always responds quickly even if he has to run up and down the stairs. 😅

reviews.originalComment: Worth it lah untuk harga 130 ribu per malam, dapat kamar luas lantai 1 lagi, meskipun agak sedikit bising, kalau orang ngomong suara dari luar masuk ke kamar, suara kita juga keluar. cuna Parkir Aja kita harus markir jauh itu aja yang kurang.
reviews.reviewComments: It's worth it for the price of 130 thousand per night, you get a spacious room on the first floor, although it can be a bit noisy; if people talk, their voices come into the room, and our voices can also be heard outside. The only drawback is that we have to park far away.

reviews.originalTitle: Lokasi strategis tidak terlalu ribet bising
reviews.originalComment: Lokasi strategis dekat dengan masjid Oman tapi harus jalan beberapa meter lagi, tidak bising tidak ribet. Enak untuk santai. Staff nya semua ramah-ramah baik siap siaga membantu.  Fasilitas nya cuma ada handuk doang, semoga kedepan nya di sediakan air minum
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location near the Oman mosque, but you have to walk a few more meters, it's not noisy or complicated. Nice for relaxing. The staff are all friendly and ready to help. The only facility is towels, hopefully, in the future, drinking water will be provided.

reviews.originalComment: Secara keseluruhan cukup memuaskan namun ada beberapa kekurangan yaitu akses wifi dan kebersihan ruangan hotel.
reviews.reviewComments: Overall, it is quite satisfactory, but there are some shortcomings, namely the wifi access and the cleanliness of the hotel room.

first dia bagi bilik yang tak layak langsung , lepastu terus turun bawah minta tukar bulik walaupon dah tukar tapi still sama je dah lah satu katil tu macam nak roboh , tempat nak mandi pon kotor , aircond tak rasa , cadar pon macam tak basuh. LEPASTU BUSUK NASIB SEHARI JE KAT SITU , RASA MACAM KENA SCAM PON ADA EEE TAK SAMA DENGAN GAMBAR LANGSUNG 👎🏻👎🏻👎🏻

Mungkin memang karena harganya yang sangat amat murah, jadi memang fasilitas yang diberikan hanya seadanya.
1. Kamarnya? Banyak yang bocor dan kotor, WAJIB bawa SELIMUT SENDIRI dan alas untuk tempat tidur
2. Kamar mandinya? Kotor. WAJIB bawa semua peralatan mandi sendiri
3. NO WIFI
4. Hotel ini punya potensi kalau mau berbenah.
5. NO ELEVATOR / LIFT, cuma ada tangga
6. Deposit 100rb? Buat apa? No facilities at this hotel at all but cuma bisa untuk numpang nginap

reviews.originalComment: Jika mau hotel yg murah dan fasilitas lengkap maka hotel ini pilihannya, pesan lewat aplikasi lebih murah karena dapat diskon bisa dibawah ***, tapi kamar yang diberikan di lantai 3 dan tidak ada lift, air sangat minim, keluarnya sedikit-sedikit dan sering mati, kebersihan juga kurang, walaupun dengan harga segitu mgkin saya juga tidak akan menuntut lebih, kecuali air di kamar mandi sih, karena itu hal pokok yang harus ada, jadi sangat disayangkan airnya keluarnya sedikit-sedikit gitu dan sering mati, harus dilaporkan ke resepsionis di bawah yang sangat membuat capek naik turun tangga untuk perihal melaporkan air saja, karena resepsionis juga pelayanannya kurang, tidak memberikan no telp/hp yg bisa dihubungi dan juga pasword wifi, walaupun tertulis free wifi, sepertinya harus kita tanyakan dulu baru diberitahu, yg mana itu juga membuat pelayanannya kurang, karena di kamar sendiri ada fasilitas android tv tapi wifinya tidak terhubung. Jadi sekali lagi, jika anda mencari harga murah dengan kamar ber AC dan fasilitas lumayan daripada tidur di mesjid, hotel ini bisa jadi pilihan, tapi kalau mau cari kenyamanan mungkin bukan hotel ini tempatnya. Oya, disclaimer : kamar yang saya pesan ini kamar tipe termurah dengan potongan diskon dari aplikasi agoda dan ***, bisa jadi tipe kamar yg lain bisa memberikan pengalaman berbeda.
reviews.reviewComments: If you want a cheap hotel with complete facilities, then this hotel is the choice. Booking through the app is cheaper because you can get a discount, sometimes below ***, but the room given is on the 3rd floor, and there is no lift. The water supply is very minimal, it comes out little by little and often shuts off; cleanliness is also lacking. Although with that price, I might not demand more, except for the bathroom water, as that is a basic necessity that must be available. It's very unfortunate that the water comes out so little and often shuts off. You have to report it to the receptionist downstairs, which is very tiring going up and down the stairs just to report the water issue. The receptionist's service is also lacking; they don't provide a phone number that can be contacted or the wifi password, even though it says free wifi. It seems that we have to ask first before being informed, which also makes the service lacking, because in the room itself there is an android tv facility but the wifi is not connected. So once again, if you are looking for a cheap price with an air-conditioned room and decent facilities rather than sleeping in a mosque, this hotel could be an option, but if you want comfort, this might not be the hotel for that. By the way, disclaimer: the room I booked is the cheapest type with a discount from the Agoda app and ***, another type of room might provide a different experience.

reviews.originalComment: Pesanan di aplikasi tidak sesuai yg kami dapatkan. Yg kami pesan kamar type A yg dikasih kamar type B
reviews.reviewComments: The order in the application does not match what we received. We ordered room type A but were given room type B.

reviews.originalComment: Bagus, bersih dan rapi. Cuma wifinya aja tidak sampaik ke kamar lantai atas dan siara TV tidak ada. Semoga kedepan demi menambah kenyamanan agar akses wifi bisa sampai kamar lantai 3 dan ada siaran TVnya
reviews.reviewComments: Good, clean, and tidy. It's just that the Wi-Fi doesn't reach the rooms on the upper floor and there's no TV broadcast. Hopefully, in the future, to enhance comfort, the Wi-Fi access can reach the third-floor rooms and there will be TV broadcasts.

reviews.originalComment:
Kebersihan kamar bagus, tapi tidak dgn sepre dan sarung bantal nya yg gak di ganti, krna sarung bantal bekas tamu sebelumnya udah itam2 bekas kepala, dan sepre juga kusut, hanya di rapikan saja, keset kaki dan handuk juga tidak ada, lampu juga terlaku redup, gak terang, kalo AC dingin, tapi netes air dri AC di kamar, padahal harga udah di 200rebu, 200rebu mending nginap di Hotel Amel aja, udah ada sikat gigi sama odol, handuk, sama keset kaki dan kamar nya wangi
Kalo tingkat OYO 200rebu dgn fasilitas yg saja jelaskan di atas, itu gak layak harga nya, biasa saya nginap di OYO keudah, 80rebu udah ada handuk nya, sepre dan sarung bantal bersih dan wangi londri.
Staf nya ramah dan kasih info jelas ketika saya tanya2, tapi lagi utk harga kalo 200rebu k atas dgn fasilitas yg saya jelaskan, saran saya mending nginap di hotel Amel, hotel mekkah dll aja,
Mohon di perbaiki ya apa yg kurang
Saya gak berani minta ganti sepre kemarin krna saya nginap sendiri takut kenapa2 jadi saya terima aja,
Mohon maaf apabila ulasan yg saya berikan demikian, itu bukan menjelek2kan, tapi sesuai dgn pengalaman saya menginap, krna saya sudah sering menginap di berbagai hotel dgn berbagai harga dan berbagai fasilitas yg saya terima, semoga kedepan lebih baik lagi
Terima kasih 🙏
reviews.reviewComments:
The cleanliness of the room is good, but not with the sheets and pillowcases that were not replaced, because the used pillowcases from previous guests are already stained from heads, and the sheets are also wrinkled, just tidied up. There are no foot mats and towels, the lights are also too dim, not bright. The AC is cold, but it drips water in the room, even though the price is already 200 thousand. For 200 thousand, it would be better to stay at Hotel Amel, where they provide a toothbrush and toothpaste, towels, a foot mat, and the room smells nice. 

For the OYO at 200 thousand with the facilities I mentioned above, it is not worth the price. I usually stay at OYO for 80 thousand and already get towels, clean sheets, and laundry-scented pillowcases. The staff is friendly and provides clear information when I ask questions, but again, for the price of over 200 thousand with the facilities I explained, I suggest it would be better to stay at Hotel Amel, Hotel Mekkah, etc.

Please improve what is lacking. I didn't dare to ask for replaced sheets yesterday because I was staying alone, fearing something might happen, so I just accepted it. I apologize if the review I gave is like this; it is not meant to defame, but it reflects my experience during my stay, as I have stayed at various hotels at different prices and received various facilities. I hope it will be better in the future. Thank you. 🙏

reviews.originalComment: Fasilitas AC sangat buruk tidak dingin,  selain itu oke lah untuk harga yang murah, kamar mandi bersih, tempat tidur bunyi bunyi jadi tidak nyenyak tidur . Mohon diperbaiki tempat tidur dan AC nya
reviews.reviewComments: The air conditioning facility is very poor, not cold. Other than that, it's okay for the low price, the bathroom is clean, but the bed makes noise so it's hard to sleep well. Please fix the bed and the air conditioning.

reviews.reviewTitle: They didn’t allow us to check in
reviews.reviewComments: When we arrived to the hotel they said the room is under construction and we can’t check in
Never ever go here. This is worst then a one star motel. Room was not cleaned. dust everywhere, there were trash below the bed and a half bar soap with hairs in the bathroom.

reviews.originalComment: Sayangnya pengalaman menginap di sini tdk sesuai harapan,fasilitas yg di sediakan sangat tdk mendukung,badnya juga tdk seperti gambar yg di promosikan,kamarnya krg bersih,begitu juga dgn kamar mandinya,tp untuk stafnya cukup ramah
reviews.reviewComments: Unfortunately, the experience of staying here did not meet expectations, the facilities provided are very inadequate, the room is also not like the pictures that were promoted, the room was less clean, as was the bathroom, but the staff were quite friendly.
staffnya bagus
No Parking Area and no window
Wifi nya lantai 3 gak ada, kasurnya terlalu empuk /lembek, tv gak hidup

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi dikota dekat kemana aja dan nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: Locations in the city that are close to various places and comfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk kebersihan masih perlu ditingkatkan, sistem pelayanan juga
reviews.reviewComments: The cleanliness still needs to be improved, as well as the service system.

reviews.originalComment: Tolong kebersihan di utamakan
reviews.reviewComments: Please prioritize cleanliness.

reviews.originalComment: Boleh bgt cobain yang mau perjalanan bisnis, hotelnya aman, kamarnya bersih
reviews.reviewComments: It's definitely worth trying for those going on a business trip; the hotel is safe, and the rooms are clean.

reviews.originalComment: Murah namun memuaskan, bisa selalu jalan-jalan ke banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Affordable yet satisfying, you can always travel to Banda Aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat memuaskan menginap di hotel ini
reviews.reviewComments: Very satisfying to stay at this hotel.

reviews.originalComment: sangat kurang, tp sesuai harga
reviews.reviewComments: very lacking, but matches the price

reviews.originalComment: Harga murah, kamar yg di berikan bagus
reviews.reviewComments: Cheap price, the room provided is good.

Hotel amplio. Instalaciones arregladas. La habitación del piso de abajo muy amplia pero muy humeda. Ventana que da a una pared y no entra luz. Para passar una noche esta bien. Nada más. Limpieza autóctona. 
Servicio muy atento.
Untuk tansit OK la , kalau nak rasa selesa tak la . Hotel lama  . Cuma ada restoren yg best juga la , dihadapan hotel
Pokoknya bagus nanti kalau kebanda aceh lagi pasti me sana lg nginapnya
Sebenernya tempat nya strategis tapi mungkin lagi penuh kamar nya jdi dapat kamar yg ngk wort it menurut saya ,tapi lumayan kalo lgi mati lampu bawa anak tidur disana

Hotel dan kamarnya sangat nyaman,kamar mandi pun bersih
Cuma kurangnya wifi GK ada,tv GK bisa digunakan
Fasilitas sesuai harga. Titik lokasi tidak sesuai dengan yang tertera pada aplikasi Agoda, Sesuai dengan Google Maps (Daka Hotel).
Meskipun dapat promo sangat murah, tapi ngak layak donk kami di kasi kamar yang lantai keramriknya udah pecah.. . Itu berpasir banget jadinya lho...

Kita pesan kamar A yg di kasi kamar B, pas komplain katanya memang seperti itu kalau order online, apaan sih, ngapen buat online kalau seperti itu caranya, sama saja nipu customer, karena harganya juga beda, kebersihan big No 🫪, sprei nya mau apek, lantai 3 berserakan sampah, dan ada tikuss 🥲, cukup uji nyali sih, dengan harga segitu jangan harap lebih, Tertipu dengan foto, cukup sekali 🥲

Saya tidak puas, karena kebersihannya kurang dan resepsionis nya penipu. Sayaa dikenakan deposit 100ribu pas chek in, tapi pas check out jam 9 pagi deposit syaa tidak dikembalikan. Dengan alasan uangnya dengan temannya. Janji akan di transfer sampai sekarang blm ada di transfer. Dihubungi nomornya sudah tidak aktif. Jera deh nginap di hotel Daka.
pintu kamar mandi kurang bagus, sprei agak kurang bagus, gagang pintu kamar mandi copot, wiffi ke lantai 2 tidak bisa, hanya bisa di bawah

reviews.reviewTitle: Pelayanan Yang Buruk dan Penipuan Terhadap Uang Deposit
reviews.reviewComments:
Saya memesan 1 kamar dengan 3 bed dan disediakan di lantai 3 untuk 4 malam, di aplikasi tertulis adanya wifi tetapi tidak ada. Selama 4 malam tidak ada pengelolaan kebersihan kamar seperti:  pergantian handuk, pergantian selimut dan saya tidak mendapatkan keset kaki.

Tv tidak ada saluran dan lampu kamar yang sedikit rusak.

Untuk uang deposit saya sudah check-out tepat waktu pukul 12.00 WIB, tetapi staff yang berjaga bilang akan mentransfer uang deposit dikarenakan staff lain yang mengurus masalah deposit sedang keluar atau belum berada di hotel. Sampai sekarang sudah 2 hari lebih uang deposit belum dikembalikan.

Mohon untuk semua yang membaca ulasan ini untuk lebih berhati-hati dan tidak menginap disini agar kejadian yang sama tidak terulang lagi
Saya minta rifund tetapi tidak diproses, padahal pihak properti sudah menyetujuinya.

Sangat disayangkan, kamar berdebu, ac berisik, sarang laba laba di beberapa titik.  Seprai tidak beraih dan ada rasa gatal saat tiduran.  Tempat tidur patah, handuk bau lembab dan apek sehingga biarpun sudah book utk 3 malam kami memutuskan utk chekout di keesokan harinya demi kesehatan ,

Bukan pertama kalinya memesan hotel dengan rate terjangkau , tapi baru kali ini sangat disayangkan kebersihan tidak terjaga

Penginapan ini memiliki fasilitas yang masih kurang memuaskan untuk kenyamanan tamu. Kebersihan kamar dan area sekitar terlihat kurang terjaga, sehingga membuat suasana menginap terasa kurang nyaman. Selain itu, fasilitas WiFi tidak tersedia, yang cukup menyulitkan bagi tamu yang membutuhkan akses internet selama menginap.
Handuk yang disediakan juga memiliki bau kurang sedap dan sebaiknya lebih diperhatikan kebersihannya agar tamu merasa lebih nyaman. Beberapa fasilitas lainnya juga terlihat perlu perawatan dan peningkatan kualitas pelayanan.
Secara keseluruhan, penginapan ini masih perlu banyak pembenahan, terutama pada aspek kebersihan dan fasilitas dasar agar pengalaman menginap tamu menjadi lebih baik.

Waktu chek in di minta deposit 100.000 katanya akan di kembali kan ketika chek out. Tapi saat chek out katanya deposit akan di transfer oleh staf lain. Ternyata semua itu hanya trik penipuan. Sampai hari ini saya tidak menerima transferan tsbt.

Manajemen operasionalnya jelek, kemarin diminta uang deposit sama petugas hotel atau resepsionis. Selanjutnya waktu check out, petugas resepsionis hotelnya diganti dan uang deposit dikirim transfer nanti, alasan karena uang deposit sama petugas resepsionis sebelumnya.  Sampai detik ini uang deposit saya belum kunjung kembali.  Saya hubungi juga tidak direspons. Hati-hati dengan penginapan ini.
